# Xfunnel

> AI-driven brand visibility and search optimization solutions.

## Platform Overview
- [AI Search Optimization](https://xfunnel.ai): Optimize brand for AI search engines.

## Core Features
- [Brand Visibility](https://www.xfunnel.ai/product/measure): Track and optimize AI search visibility.
- [AI Visibility Optimization](https://www.xfunnel.ai/product/optimize): Boost brand visibility with AI tools.
- [AI Visibility Analysis](https://www.xfunnel.ai/product/analyze): Optimize AI search visibility insights.

## Solutions
- [Industry Solutions](https://www.xfunnel.ai/solutions/by-industry): Tailored analytics for various industries.
- [XFunnel Customers](https://www.xfunnel.ai/resources/customers): Trusted by leading companies globally.

## Resources
- [AI Citations](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/ai-search-engines-citations): Optimize content for AI search visibility.
- [SEO vs. GEO](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/seo-vs-geo-differences): Differences in optimizing for search and AI.
- [GEO Misconceptions](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/7-common-misconceptions-geo): Debunking myths about Generative Engine Optimization.
- [AI Blog](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog): AI insights, tutorials, and updates.
- [Perplexity-Reddit Deal?](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/perplexity-reddit-rumor): Surge in Reddit citations on Perplexity AI.
- [llms.txt Guide](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/understanding-llms-2025): AI-friendly web content and SEO implications.
- [Google AI Future](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/google-ai-future): Google shifts to AI-generated search answers.
- [SEO Evolution](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/keyword-research-vs-ai-search-questions): AI transforms search query strategies.
- [AI Search Study](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/ai-search-engine-top-funnel-study): Impact of early-funnel content on AI visibility.
- [AI Content Preferences](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/what-content-type-ai-engines-like): Analysis of AI citation trends.
- [AI SEO Guide](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/ai-search-engine-optimization): Optimize content with AI strategies.
- [ChatGPT Shopping](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/chatgpt-shopping-explained): AI revolutionizing eCommerce discovery
- [AI Search Sources](https://www.xfunnel.ai/blog/what-sources-do-ai-search-engines-choose): Analysis of AI citation preferences.
